c.d: The range and depth of features offered, including text formatting, multimedia support, task management, and organizational tools (folders, tags, etc.).
The intuitiveness and simplicity of the user interface, making it easy to add, edit, organize, and retrieve notes quickly.
Availability across multiple platforms (iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Web) and seamless synchronization of notes across devices.
The effectiveness of organizational tools such as folders, tags, notebooks, and linking capabilities for categorizing and retrieving notes.
The availability and quality of AI-powered features such as summarizing notes, generating transcripts, and improving organization.
The ability to share and collaborate on notes with others in real-time, including features for team collaboration and project management.
The cost of the app, considering both free and paid options, and the value offered for the price.
